title: Ohne-Schnickschnack
description: This modpack is focusing on smooth gameplay and quality-of-life improvements.
body:
### A lightweight, performance-boosting Fabric modpack

This pack includes FPS optimizers like **Sodium** and **Indium**, visual enhancements, better HUDs, **Xaero’s Minimap** and **World Map**, and full **Simple Voice Chat** support.

No gameplay overhaul - just a fast, modern and **clean** Minecraft experience.
